content:
## 编译测试

**变更说明：** HookData 由全参构造器改为两个独立构造器：
- `HookData(ChatChunk chatChunk)` — toolContext 为 null
- `HookData(ToolHookContext toolContext)` — chatChunk 为 null

**变更文件：**
1. `agent-base/src/main/java/com/ghost616/agentbase/service/agent/invoker/HookData.java` — 替换 `@Data` 为 `@Getter @ToString @EqualsAndHashCode`，增加两个独立构造器
2. `agent-base/src/main/java/com/ghost616/agentbase/service/agent/ToolExecutionService.java` — `new HookData(null, ctx)` → `new HookData(ctx)`
3. `agent-base/src/main/java/com/ghost616/agentbase/service/agent/ChatService.java` — `new HookData(x, null)` → `new HookData(x)`，`new HookData(null, null)` → `new HookData((ChatChunk) null)`

**需要验证：**
- 项目编译通过
- 无 setToolContext 调用残留
- 构造器调用与新签名匹配
